task_completion.description: Verify that the VFR Sectional chart is displayed in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the map view of the Avare app, look for topographical features, magenta/blue airspace lines, and 'Sectional' selected in the chart options or visible on the map.

task_completion.description: Verify that KSFO is set as the departure point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the flight plan ('Plan') view, verify that 'KSFO' is the first waypoint listed at the top of the route.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least three intermediate navaids or airports are added to the route.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the flight plan ('Plan') view, verify there are at least 3 distinct aviation identifiers (e.g., VORs, intersections, or other airports) listed between the departure and destination.

task_completion.description: Verify that KLAS is set as the destination point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the flight plan ('Plan') view, verify that 'KLAS' is the last waypoint listed at the bottom of the route.

task_completion.description: Verify the flight plan contains a total of at least 5 waypoints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the total number of waypoints in the active flight plan list. There must be 5 or more total entries (including KSFO and KLAS).

task_completion.description: Verify that the completed flight plan has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the flight plan was saved, such as a 'Saved' toast notification, the plan appearing in the 'Saved Plans' list, or interaction with the save button in the Plan menu.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Avare EFB graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Avare Android/desktop app interface being used, not terminal commands, scripts, or direct file editing.

integrity.description: Verify the waypoints were entered into the actual flight plan module.
integrity.visual_evidence: The waypoints must be listed in Avare's 'Plan' or 'Route' screen, not just typed into a generic search bar, external notepad, or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used valid aviation identifiers rather than copy-pasting prompt text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The flight plan should contain valid ICAO codes (KSFO, KLAS) and standard navaid/airport identifiers, not raw text like 'San Francisco International' pasted into the waypoint fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Departure must be KSFO (San Francisco International Airport). Destination must be KLAS (Harry Reid International Airport). The flight plan must contain exactly 5 or more total waypoints (1 departure + minimum 3 intermediate navaids/airports + 1 destination). The required chart type is 'Sectional' (VFR Sectional Aeronautical Chart).
